description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image itzlacoliuhque/con-campari:latest and a global before_script that sets _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_=FALSE, _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=TRUE, writes R_MAX_NUM_DLLS=500 to ~/.Renviron, exports R_MAX_NUM_DLLS=500, and installs the R packages pdftools and factoextra. Define three stages: test, check, and codecov. In the test stage add a pkg_test job that runs pwd, ls, and Rscript -e 'devtools::test()'. In the check stage add a pkg_check job that runs Rscript -e 'devtools::install(upgrade = F)' followed by Rscript -e 'devtools::check(cran = TRUE)'. In the codecov stage add a pkg_codecov job that runs Rscript -e "covr::codecov(quiet = F, token = '266db23c-b9d1-405f-9aef-c5889ea5227d')".
